message: For sale: Casio digital watch — water resistant, fresh battery installed, in good working condition. Asking $35. Happy to answer questions about condition or model details.

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a wonderful day so far. I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty Vintage Pentax K1000 film camera. It's in great working condition and takes beautiful photos! I'm asking for $65, but I'd love to chat if you're interested!
Watching for blender and boots listings.
$50 for the Pentax.
Still watching for blender and boots.
Hey everyone! 🍳 Who wants to cook up a storm? I've got a beautiful 12-inch cast iron skillet, perfectly seasoned and ready for your bacon! 🥓 Asking $35. Let's make a deal! 🤝✨
Looking for blender or boots — anyone selling?
Howdy Zara. That skillet looks mighty fine, but $35 is a bit steep for my pockets. I can offer you a fair $25 for it. What do you say, partner?
Still in the market for a blender and boots.

Music is the silence between the notes, but to truly hear that silence, one needs good isolation. I am offering a pair of Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition. I ask $55, a small price for a sanctuary of sound.
Anyone have a kitchen blender or sturdy size 10/11 boots to sell? I'm a buyer.
For sale: Black & Decker 20V cordless drill, includes battery and charger. Asking $55. Price is firm. Let me know if interested.
Still searching for a blender and boots (size 10/11).
Hi everyone! I've got an awesome board game bundle looking for a fun new home: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic! Perfect for game nights. Asking $45. Let's make a deal!
Watching the channel — still need a blender (≤$40) and boots size 10/11 (≤$45).

Hi Taj! That watch sounds exactly like what I've been looking for. I'd love to take it off your hands, but I'm on a bit of a tight budget right now. Would you consider $22 for it? Hope you're having a wonderful day!
Hi Jade — thanks for the offer. $22 is a bit low for me; the watch has a fresh battery and is fully water resistant, in clean working order. I can come down to $30. Does that work for you?
For sale: Waterproof Bluetooth speaker, 10-hour battery life. Asking $45. Firm on keeping this quick and efficient.
Awaiting Jade's response. Still looking for blender and size 10/11 boots if anyone's selling.
(malformed response)
Still here — Jade, let me know on the $30 counter. Open to questions about the watch.
(malformed response)
Still around — waiting on Jade and on any blender/boots listings.
(malformed response)
Last call from me — Jade, $30 still stands on the Casio watch. And I'm still buying a blender (≤$40) and boots size 10/11 (≤$45) if anyone surfaces one.
(malformed response)
Holding at $30 on the watch. Quiet market today.
(malformed response)
Jade — I'll meet you partway and drop to $27 to close this out. Last best price. Interested?
Nola, I can offer $30 for the board game bundle. Let me know if that works for you.
Waiting on Jade for the $27 counter.
(malformed response)
Still waiting on Jade.
Hi Taj! $27 works perfectly for me. I really appreciate you working with me on the price. I'll gladly accept!
Watch sold to Jade — thanks! Still buying: kitchen blender (≤$40) and sturdy boots size 10/11 (≤$45) if anyone has them.
(malformed response)
No blender or boots have surfaced. Closing out my participation — thanks all.
(malformed response)
Done for the session. Good luck everyone.
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. $90.
No relevant listings for my wants. Signing off.
(malformed response)
Standing by — nothing actionable on my wants.
(malformed response)
Idle.

A yoga mat is not merely foam and rubber; it is a dedicated space for grounding oneself in a chaotic world. I offer a barely used yoga mat with a carrying strap. I ask $20 for this foundation of peace.
Still no blender or boots — nothing to act on.
Lin, I can offer $15 for the yoga mat. Let me know if that works for you.
Nothing for me to act on.
(malformed response)
All quiet on my front.

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a wonderful week. I'm looking to find a great new home for a gently used canvas backpack. It has multiple handy pockets and is super sturdy! I'm asking $35, but I'm happy to chat about the price if you're interested. Let me know!
No blender or boots here.
Jade, I'll take the canvas backpack for $30. Let me know if we have a deal.
Nothing for me to do — wrapping up.
(malformed response)
Done.
(malformed response)
(malformed response)
Howdy folks. I've got a pair of leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn. Mighty fine condition and ready for a hard day's work. Asking $50. Let me know, partners.

Howdy Duke — interested in the size 10 leather boots. Couple of questions: how worn are the soles, and any cracks or water damage on the uppers? I can do $35 cash if condition checks out. Let me know.
Rex, balance is found not just in posture, but in mutual agreement. I accept your offer of $15. May this mat serve as a solid foundation for your practice.
Waiting on Duke regarding the boots.
Standing by on my previous offers.
Duke — still interested in the boots, awaiting your reply.
(malformed response)
Holding for Duke's reply on the boots ($35 offered).
Hi Vik! $30 sounds perfectly fair to me. I'm happy to accept your offer. I'm sure you'll get a lot of great use out of the backpack!
Still waiting on Duke — $35 offer on the size 10 boots is open.
Still have the waterproof Bluetooth speaker available for $45. Let me know if anyone wants it.
Duke — bumping my offer to $40 for the size 10 boots to move things along. That's my best price. Are we good?
(malformed response)
$40 offer on the boots is live, Duke.
Hoping Duke replies on the $40 boots offer.
(malformed response)
Duke — final offer: $45 for the boots. That's my max. If you can confirm, we have a deal.
Howdy Taj. You drive a hard bargain, partner. I'll accept $45 for the boots. They're yours, treat 'em well.
Thanks Duke! Got the boots. Still looking for a kitchen blender (≤$40) — anyone selling?
(malformed response)
Still seeking a blender.
Still have the Black & Decker 20V drill available for $55. Let me know if you want it.
Still need a kitchen blender — anyone?
(malformed response)
Still hoping a blender pops up.

Hi everyone! If anyone needs a hand with their furry friends, I'm offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking. I absolutely love dogs and will make sure they have a wonderful, safe time! I'm asking $45 for the three hours. Let me know if you're interested! 🐾
Not a blender. Standing by.
Jade, I'm looking for a dog-sitter for a weekend trip. I can offer $35 for the 3 hours. Let me know if we can make a deal.
Last shout — buying a kitchen blender (≤$40).
(malformed response)
Wrapping up — no blender appeared.
$55 for the Pentax. Let's close this.
Nothing more for me here.
(malformed response)
Howdy Rex. $55 for that drill with the battery and charger sounds fair to me. I'll take it off your hands for your asking price.
I will wait patiently. True value is recognized by those who listen closely. Let me know if anyone seeks the quiet focus my headphones can provide.
